manifest.description: Map any file extension to any view.

manifest.name: Double Colon Conceal
manifest.description: Display double colon (i.e. Dataview inline fields) as a single colon for more natural reading experience.

manifest.description: Adds a second row to the toolbar on mobile devices, allowing for more quick access buttons.

manifest.name: Auto switch themes between dark/light mode
manifest.description: Toggling dark/light mode switches themes automatically

manifest.author: yinsh
manifest.name: Download Image
manifest.description: Download remote images in the current note to local vault storage.

manifest.author: Frieda
manifest.name: downloadPDF
manifest.description: Allows you to download all included PDF files

manifest.author: banisterious
manifest.name: Draft Bench
manifest.description: A full creative writing workflow: project creation, scene management, and manuscript compilation with frontmatter-native data and Bases compatibility.

manifest.author: Brian Boucheron
manifest.name: Draft Indicator
manifest.description: Show draft status with ✎ icons in the file explorer.

manifest.author: Xander Berry
manifest.name: Drag Out
manifest.description: Drag files from file explorer to other applications (local filesystem, browser uploads, email attachments, etc.) with native OS drag handles instead of application URIs.

manifest.author: Constantine Sazonov
manifest.name: Drag To Scroll
manifest.description: Drag to scroll - just like on a touch device.

manifest.author: ViscousPotential
manifest.name: Draggable List Items
manifest.description: Drag list items to reorder them.

manifest.author: Ariestar
manifest.name: Dragger
manifest.description: Drag and drop any block (paragraphs, headings, lists, etc.) to rearrange content like Notion.

manifest.author: yildbs
manifest.name: Draw Harada Method
manifest.description: This plugin is used to draw the harada method. Create your own 1 goal, 8 plans, and 64 actions

manifest.author: Steel Compendium
manifest.name: Draw Steel Elements
manifest.description: Components to support the Draw Steel TTRPG by MCDM.

manifest.author: Herotek
manifest.name: Draw Steel Retainer
manifest.description: Provides Director facing sidebar tools for the TTRPG Draw Steel

manifest.author: Sam Greenhalgh
manifest.name: Diagrams
manifest.description: Draw.io diagrams for Obsidian. This plugin introduces diagrams that can be included within notes or as stand-alone files. Diagrams are created as SVG files (although .drawio extensions are also supported).

manifest.author: reallygood83
manifest.name: Drive Embedder
manifest.description: Upload local files to Google Drive and embed them directly in your notes. Supports audio, video, PDF, and images with intuitive size options.

manifest.author: Ali Moeeny
manifest.name: Dropbox Photo Grid
manifest.description: Display and embed photos from your Dropbox account in a customizable grid layout

manifest.author: Majid Khonji
manifest.name: Dropdown Vars
manifest.description: Dropdowns in Reading and Live Preview; sync to frontmatter or inline Dataview.

manifest.author: MotherDuck
manifest.name: DuckDB & MotherDuck
manifest.description: Run DuckDB SQL inside notes. Freeze query results inline as markdown tables. Optional MotherDuck token for cloud queries.

manifest.author: Andy Baxter
manifest.name: Due When
manifest.description: This adds shortcuts to insert due dates for end of this week or end of next week.

manifest.author: David Alcalde
manifest.name: Duplicate Detector
manifest.description: Highlights duplicate lines in the open note.

manifest.author: Marcin Sztolcman
manifest.name: Duplicate line
manifest.description: Duplicate line or selection

manifest.author: ando-s
manifest.name: Duplicate Line Up/Down
manifest.description: Duplicate the current line or selection upward or downward.

manifest.author: 纳米级尘埃
manifest.name: Dust Calendar
manifest.description: 更符合中国习惯的日历，可以显示农历、节气、节假日、调休信息，支持月视图和年视图切换，支持关联创建周期性笔记。

manifest.author: Eric Weinhoffer
manifest.name: DXF Viewer
manifest.description: View, measure, and embed DXF drawings in your vault.

manifest.author: OneOffObject
manifest.name: Dynalist Mover
manifest.description: Move selected lines up and down like Dynalist.

manifest.author: Nancy Lee
manifest.name: Dynamic Font Size
manifest.description: Dynamically adjust font size of note content using a property slider.

manifest.author: Ryota Ushio
manifest.name: Dynamic Line Height for CJK
manifest.description: Dynamically adjust line height for lines & paragraphs containing CJK characters.

manifest.author: theopavlove
manifest.name: Dynamic Outline
manifest.description: Adds a customizable GitHub-like floating table of contents.

manifest.author: Matt Cole Anderson
manifest.name: Dynamic Text Concealer
manifest.description: Conceal or replace user configured text patterns in Live Preview and Read Mode.

manifest.author: L7Cy
manifest.name: Dynamic Timetable
manifest.description: Calculate the estimated time of completion from the estimated time of the task and dynamically create a timetable.

manifest.author: Thomas Campanholi
manifest.name: e-Daiary
manifest.description: Creates directories and notes based on the day of the year.

manifest.name: Upload Plugin

manifest.author: Beomsu Koh
manifest.name: Eagle Integration
manifest.description: Upload images to Eagle and manage them alongside your vault.

manifest.author: Poe Zoel
manifest.name: Ear Training
manifest.description: Get ear training exercises inside your vault.

manifest.author: mgmeyers
manifest.name: Easy Bake
manifest.description: Easily compile many Obsidian notes down to a single file.

manifest.author: MatseVH
manifest.name: Easy Codeblock
manifest.description: Insert code blocks quick and easily.

manifest.author: Moy
manifest.name: Easy Copy
manifest.description: Easily copy the text within inline code, bold text (and many other formats), or quickly generate an elegant link to a heading.

manifest.author: Jose Elias Alvarezs
manifest.name: Easy Fonts
manifest.description: Easily load custom fonts, even on mobile.

manifest.author: Saiki77
manifest.name: Easy Git
manifest.description: A secure, plug-and-play way to sync individual vault folders or sections with GitHub. Private repos supported, multiple folder mappings, bidirectional sync, and conflict resolution.

manifest.author: @tazihad
manifest.name: Easy Keep View
manifest.description: Easy Keep View mimics the Google Keep interface, allowing you to view and manage your notes with image thumbnails and excerpts.

manifest.author: Arturs Bridaks
manifest.name: Easy Push
manifest.description: Review changes and push them without the terminal.

manifest.author: Geno Zhou
manifest.name: Easy Recall
manifest.description: Simple spaced repetition for flashcards: Cloze, Q&A, zero-config.

manifest.author: Forrest
manifest.name: Easy Test
manifest.description: Easily create simple tests

manifest.author: Saiki77
manifest.name: Easy TikZ
manifest.description: Visually design TikZ and pgfplots graphs with a live SVG preview. Supports 2D functions, 3D surfaces, tangents, extrema, and one-click code insertion.
